steps.title: Spot the contextual signal
steps.content: The blank parallels 'illuminate the Pleistocene epoch' and 'reveal important details.' Misliya-1's remains help researchers identify or make out evolutionary steps.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The blank needs to mean identify or make out — parallel to "illuminate" and "reveal," Misliya-1's remains help researchers perceive evolutionary steps. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — yield: "can help paleoanthropologists yield steps in the evolution" — yield means produce or give. Researchers don't produce evolutionary steps; they figure them out. ✗
  • Choice B — discern: "can help paleoanthropologists discern steps in the evolution" — discern means to perceive or distinguish clearly. The fossil remains let scientists make out what those evolutionary steps were. ✓
  • Choice C — prioritize: "can help paleoanthropologists prioritize steps in the evolution" — prioritize means rank by importance. The passage is about identifying what happened, not ranking it. ✗
  • Choice D — exploit: "can help paleoanthropologists exploit steps in the evolution" — exploit means take advantage of. Researchers are studying the steps, not exploiting them. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
